sentence: 这批进口商品需要缴纳关税。
pinyin: Zhè pī jìnkǒu shāngpǐn xūyào jiǎonà guānshuì.
english: Customs duties must be paid on this batch of imported goods.

sentence: 入境时要在海关申报携带的物品。
pinyin: Rù jìng shí yào zài hǎi guān shēn bào xié dài de wù pǐn.
english: When entering the country, you need to declare the items you are carrying at customs.

sentence: 这个行业的发展前景非常好。
pinyin: Zhège hángyè de fāzhǎn qiánjǐng fēicháng hǎo.
english: The development prospects of this industry are very promising.

sentence: 今天气温很低，记得多穿衣服。
pinyin: Jīn tiān qì wēn hěn dī, jì de duō chuān yī fu.
english: The temperature is very low today — remember to dress warmly.

sentence: 他花了三年时间编写这本教材。
pinyin: Tā huā le sān nián shí jiān biān xiě zhè běn jiào cái.
english: He spent three years compiling this textbook.
